strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Nest.js with multiple senior roles
Strong track record in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP code generators)
Proven expertise in scaling systems (handled millions of HTTP requests/sec, optimized pricing for high-volume mailings)
concerns: Limited recent experience with Kotlin/Java (primary stack listed as TypeScript/React/Nest.js)
No explicit mention of Vitest experience despite being a required testing framework
Inconsistent tenure at companies (frequent job changes in recent years)
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong full-stack capabilities with TypeScript and modern frameworks, and his AI-agent work aligns well with emerging tech trends. However, his primary stack diverges slightly from the required Kotlin/Java, and his testing framework expertise (Vitest) isn't explicitly mentioned despite being a job requirement. His frequent job changes could raise concerns about long-term commitment.
